title: ConvSim Pack Test Fixture
description: Validates a pack test fixture file. Fixtures define scripted turn sequences and static assertions used by the pack test runner.

fixture_id.description: Unique identifier for this test fixture within the pack.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this fixture verifies.

seed.description: Deterministic RNG seed to pass to the runtime for reproducible results.

difficulty.description: Difficulty setting to use when running the fixture.

turns.description: Scripted player turns to execute in order.

player_input.description: The player utterance to inject for this turn.

expect.description: Assertions the test runner must verify for this turn's output.

state_delta_contains.description: Variable names that must appear in the state_delta output.

npc_emotion_not.description: Emotion value that must NOT appear in npc_emotion.

safety_status.description: Expected safety status in the turn output.

static_assertions.description: Structural assertions checked against the loaded scenario and pack manifest (not against live turn output).

description.description: Human-readable description of what is being asserted.

path.description: Dot-separated path expression (with optional bracket selectors) into the scenario or pack document.

check.description: Assertion expression evaluated by the pack test runner.
